fact: redcentric.site is a live website presenting itself as 'RedCentric | Recruitment Agency' offering 'Professional Recruitment & Staffing Solutions Worldwide' — operating on a low-credibility .site TLD. The well-established, legitimate Redcentric company (a UK managed IT services provider) operates from redcentricplc.com, not a .site domain.

No individual named 'James Addam' (or any close variant such as 'James Adams', 'James Addams', or 'James Adam') can be found associated with redcentric.site in any first-party or third-party source — including the live redcentric.site homepage (which renders only generic agency copy with no named staff), LinkedIn, press mentions, or professional directories. The only 'James Addam' surfaced in web search is an unrelated SoundCloud music account. The only 'James Addams' surfaced is a vintage film actor on IMDB. No recruiter by this name is linked to redcentric.site anywhere online.

Redcentric PLC (redcentricplc.com) is a legitimate, publicly listed (AIM: LSE:RCN) UK IT managed services provider, founded in 1997 and headquartered at Central House, Beckwith Knowle, Harrogate, North Yorkshire. Its own About Us page (last indexed 2025) states '500+ employees' and 'Founded in 1997'; LinkedIn lists a '450-strong team'. Companies House confirms it is an active Public Limited Company (incorporated 11 February 2013, company no. 08397584). The domain redcentric.site is entirely separate and unrelated to this entity, with no comparable third-party coverage or verifiable business presence.
